commands.review_summary:
The PR switches the `hooks.gmail.model` doctor health checks to load the model catalog in read-only mode and adds regression tests for both the core health registry and legacy doctor contribution.

PR surface: Source 0, Tests +74. Total +74 across 4 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main has both hooks-model doctor paths calling `loadModelCatalog` without `readOnly`, which enters the writable catalog path. The PR body also provides after-fix terminal proof that targeted lint leaves `models.json` absent.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane: the patch is focused with no discrete actionable review finding, so the remaining action is maintainer review and checks rather than automated code changes.

target.title: fix(doctor): keep hooks model checks read-only
target.body:
## Summary
- load the model catalog in read-only mode for `hooks.gmail.model` doctor checks
- keep doctor/lint from taking writable catalog side effects while validating configured hook models
- add regression coverage for both the core health check and the legacy doctor health contribution

Refs #86044

## Validation
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `CI=true pnpm check:test-types`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint src/flows/doctor-core-checks.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `git diff --check refs/remotes/origin/main...HEAD`

## Manual proof
With a temp `OPENCLAW_HOME` containing only `hooks.gmail.model`, targeted lint emitted the expected warning and did not create `models.json`:

```text
lint_exit=1 elapsed_s=26
models_json=
{"ok":false,"checksRun":1,"checksSkipped":16,"findings":[{"checkId":"core/doctor/hooks-model","severity":"warning","message":"hooks.gmail.model \"openai/gpt-5.5\" is not in the model catalog.","path":"hooks.gmail.model","fixHint":"Choose a model from the configured provider catalog."}]}
```

A full doctor run also completed successfully in the source checkout; it was slower due to unrelated broad workspace checks.
